title: Ignition Point
description: Ready to accelerate. Scroll or use the arrow keys to drive through my journey.

title: Unity Development
description: Fell in love with gameplay programming. Built custom physics controllers, vehicle dynamics, and procedural audio systems.

title: AI Traffic Controller
description: Engineered a scalable multi-threaded AI traffic system. Features lane-changing logic, obstruction avoidance, and grid pathfinding.

title: URP & Custom HLSL
description: Integrated Unity's Universal Render Pipeline. Crafted custom vehicle paint shaders (metallic, flake, clear coat) and environmental rain effects.

title: Realtime Multiplayer
description: Developed server-authoritative multiplayer using Photon Fusion. Built prediction buffers for lag compensation and physics sync.

title: WebGL Racing Engine
description: Successfully compiled, optimized, and deployed the racing engine to WebAssembly. Time to test drive the simulation!
